patient_text: test patient HCC TACE-refractory ICI-naive Child-Pugh A6

hypotheses.text: Bevacizumab + atezolizumab as IMbrave150 backbone is the established phase III option for first-line HCC
WNT/β-catenin pathway co-activation with TGF-β predicts ICI resistance in TACE-refractory HCC — emergent target-pair worth testing in GSE164760 cohort
hypotheses.testability_path: GSE164760 HCC TACE-refractory cohort + GSEA Hallmark WNT_BETA_CATENIN + TGF_BETA signatures; CRISPR dual-knockout in HepG2 PDX

hypotheses.text: Candidate scaffold targeting β-catenin DEP-domain interface (currently undrugged) via ESMFold + DiffDock virtual screen against ChEMBL fragment library
hypotheses.testability_path: ESMFold model of CTNNB1 DEP-domain; DiffDock virtual screen of ChEMBL fragment library (FW < 350); BLI against recombinant CTNNB1-DEP; functional rescue in HCC organoid
